entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) studied for yield loss due to pest damage.

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from damage by pests.

entities.name: HELIOCHEILUS ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: The millet head miner, a noctuid pest that causes panicle damage in pearl millet.

entities.name: DAMAGE RATING SCALE
entities.description: A tool used to quantify panicle damage for the assessment of yield loss.

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to establish linear equations for predicting yield loss.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the research and field assessments were conducted.

entities.name: SADORE LOCAL
entities.description: A local variety of pearl millet used in the field assessment of yield loss.

entities.name: LINEAR EQUATIONS
entities.description: Mathematical models established to relate damage ratings to percentage yield loss.
